steps.t: Palma Brownlock is waiting to speak with you on the hills outside Naerost. Palma has somehow convinced you to sneak into the ruins of Naerost to reacq…
The sword Medhrod is somewhere within the ruins of Naerost. The half-orcs that stole Medhrod are surely keeping the sword under close watch inside the…
Palma Brownlock is on the slope outside the ruins of Naerost. Palma is eagerly awaiting your return with Medhrod.
